101.name: Instructor Vex
101.description: A battle-scarred veteran with kind eyes. She teaches newcomers the fundamentals of survival.

dialogue.text: Welcome, traveler. I can teach you the basics. Type 'help' to see all commands. Use 'go <direction>' to move, 'look <thing>' to examine, and 'attack <enemy>' to fight. Remember — you can always 'flee' from combat.
You're getting stronger. Remember: puzzles are the key to finding what you seek. Combat gets you there, but your mind opens the doors.

102.name: Bazaar Keeper Morrigan
102.description: A shrewd-eyed woman in colorful robes. She manages the marketplace and can appraise items.

dialogue.text: Buy, sell, trade — the Bazaar has it all. Other travelers leave their wares here. Browse the stalls or ask me about prices.

103.name: Grindstone the Armorer
103.description: A stocky dwarf with arms like tree trunks. His beard is singed at the tips from forge work.

dialogue.text: Need steel? I've got blades from every realm. Bring me materials and I can forge something special.
Ah, you've been to the Crown! Bring me Ironwood and I'll make you something worthy of a knight.

104.name: Madame Veil
104.description: An ethereal woman whose features shift slightly each time you look away. She brews potions and sells remedies.

dialogue.text: Healing, haste, strength — I brew them all. But the best potions require rare ingredients from the zones. Bring me what I need and I'll make something... special.

105.name: Courier Dash
105.description: A hyperactive halfling who never stops moving. Packages and letters are strapped all over his body.

dialogue.text: Deliveries! I've got deliveries that need making! If you're heading to any of the zones, I might have a package for you. Good coin in courier work!

106.name: Syllith the Lore Keeper
106.description: An ancient elf whose age is impossible to guess. His eyes hold the weight of millennia. He knows things about the marble.

dialogue.text: Ah, another seeker. The sphere you chase — it has been here before. Many times. It rolls through all realms, gathering... something. Memories, perhaps. Or purpose.
You've solved a puzzle! The marble noticed. It always does. Each lock you open, it moves faster. But it also leaves more traces. Keep looking.

107.name: Bounty Master Krell
107.description: A grizzled half-orc with a ledger book and a no-nonsense attitude. He manages the bounty system.

dialogue.text: Got bounties that need filling. Kill creatures, bring proof, get paid. Simple as that. Check the board for current postings.

108.name: Training Construct
108.description: A mechanical humanoid made of bronze and crystal. It activates when challenged and fights at a level appropriate to its opponent.

dialogue.text: [CONSTRUCT ONLINE] Training mode active. Attack me to practice combat. I will not pursue if you flee.

109.name: Tumble the Barkeep
109.description: A massive orc with a surprisingly gentle demeanor. He polishes glasses with hands that could crush skulls.

dialogue.text: What'll it be? I hear things from travelers. Rumors, tips, warnings. Buy a drink and I might share what I know.
Word is, something's been rolling through the Noir district. Knocked over a stack of crates in the warehouse. The detective's looking into it.

110.name: The Hooded Gambler
110.description: A figure of indeterminate race and gender. Their hood never slips. They shuffle cards with inhuman speed.

dialogue.text: Care for a game? I deal in information, not coin. Win a hand, and I'll tell you something useful. Lose... and you owe me a favor.

1001.name: Feral Wolf
1001.description: A gaunt grey wolf with matted fur and hungry eyes. It circles you, looking for weakness.

1002.name: Goblin Scout
1002.description: A wiry green-skinned creature clutching a rusty dagger. It hisses at you.

1003.name: Goblin Archer
1003.description: A goblin perched on a rock, nocking a crude arrow. Its aim looks surprisingly steady.

1004.name: Skeleton Warrior
1004.description: Bones held together by dark magic. It raises a notched sword with hollow eye sockets fixed on you.

1005.name: Skeleton Archer
1005.description: A skeletal figure drawing a bowstring with bony fingers. An eerie blue glow fills its eye sockets.

1006.name: Dire Boar
1006.description: A massive boar the size of a horse. Its tusks are stained with old blood and its eyes are wild with rage.

1007.name: Bandit Thug
1007.description: A rough-looking human in mismatched armor. A crude tattoo marks him as part of the Thornhold gang.

1008.name: Bandit Captain
1008.description: A scarred woman in decent chainmail. She commands the thugs with sharp barks and a bloodied mace.

1009.name: Corrupted Treant
1009.description: A twisted tree that moves with malicious intent. Dark sap oozes from cracks in its bark like black blood.

1010.name: Will-o'-Wisp
1010.description: A floating orb of pale blue light that drifts hypnotically. Those who follow it tend not to return.

1011.name: Cave Troll
1011.description: A hulking grey-skinned brute that barely fits in the passage. It smells of rotting meat and swings a tree trunk as a club.

1012.name: Wraith
1012.description: A translucent figure of shadow and grief. The temperature drops as it drifts toward you, reaching with spectral claws.

1013.name: Giant Spider
1013.description: A spider the size of a large dog. Its mandibles drip with venom and its many eyes reflect your terrified face.

1014.name: Venomous Serpent
1014.description: A thick-bodied snake with iridescent scales. It coils and strikes with blinding speed.

1015.name: Gargoyle
1015.description: What you thought was a statue unfolds stone wings and drops from its perch. Its eyes glow red.

1016.name: Cursed Knight
1016.description: A suit of armor that moves without a body inside. Its visor is empty darkness, but its sword arm is strong.

1017.name: Swamp Lurker
1017.description: A humanoid shape made of mud and rotting vegetation. It rises from the muck with a wet sucking sound.

1018.name: Plague Rat
1018.description: An oversized rat with patchy fur and weeping sores. It moves in packs but this one is alone — for now.

1019.name: Old Farmer Giles
1019.description: A weathered old man leaning on a pitchfork. His farm has seen better days, and his eyes are tired.

dialogue.text: Wolves been takin' my sheep. Three of 'em, big grey ones. Kill 'em and I'll give you what coin I have.
Bless you, traveler. The wolves are gone. Here's your reward.

1020.name: Wandering Herbalist
1020.description: A young woman with a basket of herbs and a worried expression. She's looking for something specific.

dialogue.text: I need Moonpetal flowers — they only grow in the deep forest. Bring me three and I'll brew you a powerful healing potion.
You found them! Here, take this Greater Healing Draught. You've earned it.

1021.name: Sir Aldric the Fallen
1021.description: A knight in battered armor sitting against a tree. His shield bears the crest of a kingdom that no longer exists.

dialogue.text: I was sworn to protect the Crown... but it shattered. Now I guard nothing. If you seek the throne room, beware the statues. They watch.
You aligned the statues? Then you've done what I could not. The Crown's last secret is revealed. I wonder... was it worth guarding?

1022.name: Mysterious Cloaked Figure
1022.description: A figure in a deep green cloak stands at the crossroads. Their face is hidden, but they seem to be waiting for you specifically.

dialogue.text: I've seen what you seek. A sphere of glass and light. It rolled through here three days ago — or was it three centuries? Time is strange in the Crown. It went toward the throne room, but it won't be there when you arrive. It never is.

1023.name: Blacksmith Hanna
1023.description: A muscular woman hammering at an anvil. Sparks fly with each strike. Her work is clearly superior to anything the bandits carry.

dialogue.text: Need repairs? Bring me Ironwood Bark and I'll reinforce your gear. Or if you've got coin, I sell blades that actually hold an edge.

2001.name: Rogue Android
2001.description: A malfunctioning service android with glowing red eyes.

2002.name: Corporate Security Drone
2002.description: A hovering drone armed with a light blaster.

2003.name: Cyber-Punk Thug
2003.description: A street gang member with cheap chrome implants.

2004.name: Mutant Rat
2004.description: An oversized rat glowing with toxic sludge.

2005.name: Hacker Bot
2005.description: A small spider-like bot used for slicing terminals.

2006.name: Combat Mech
2006.description: A heavy bipedal mech with mounted machine guns.

2007.name: Viral Construct
2007.description: A physical manifestation of a computer virus, glitching in and out of reality.

2008.name: Glitch Entity
2008.description: A corrupted hologram that deals electrical damage.

2009.name: Corrupt AI Node
2009.description: A stationary server rack defending itself with laser grids.

2011.name: Augmented Thug
2011.description: A massive brute with hydraulic arms.

2012.name: Netrunner Phantom
2012.description: The digital ghost of a fried netrunner.

2013.name: Chrome Beast
2013.description: A genetically modified dog with titanium plating.

2014.name: Toxic Waste Slime
2014.description: A sentient puddle of industrial runoff.

2015.name: Shock Trooper
2015.description: An elite corporate soldier with a plasma rifle.

2016.name: Data Wraith
2016.description: A terrifying amalgamation of stolen data and rogue code.

2017.name: Overclocked Sentinel
2017.description: A boss-level security robot, glowing with excess heat.

2018.name: Rogue Nanobots
2018.description: A swarm of microscopic machines devouring everything.

2019.name: Fixer Nine
2019.description: A sharp-dressed info broker leaning against a neon sign.
dialogue: Need some intel? It'll cost ya.
I heard a perfect sphere rolled through here recently. Left no reflection in the puddles. Weird, right?
If you find an Encrypted Data Chip, bring it to me. Or don't. I hear it's just garbage anyway.

2020.name: Doc Splice
2020.description: A back-alley cybernetics doctor with blood on his apron.
dialogue: Need an upgrade? I got fresh chrome.
Someone came in here looking for a Charged Cyber-Eye. You can make one if you combine a Severed Cyber-Eye with a Power Cell.

2021.name: Neon Mama
2021.description: The tough-as-nails owner of the local dive bar.
dialogue: Drink up or get out.
I saw a dent in the floorboards over there. Perfectly circular. Like a heavy marble dropped from the ceiling.

2022.name: Pixel
2022.description: A young kid with a neural jack plugged into a datapad.
dialogue: I'm trying to hack the mainframe, but I need a Power Cell!
Have you seen my missing drone?

2023.name: Chrome Dog
2023.description: A bounty hunter covered in weapons and armor.
dialogue: I'm hunting a rogue android. Seen one?
Stay out of my way, rookie.

3001.name: Detective Malone
3001.description: A weary detective in a trench coat, smoking a cigarette.
dialogue: I'm looking for a safe combo. The year the war ended, maybe? 1945.
Watch your back in these alleys.

3002.name: Velvet
3002.description: A glamorous jazz singer in a sequined dress.
dialogue: The boss is keeping something shiny in the vault.
I saw something roll through the rain, leaving a dry trail on wet pavement.

3003.name: Sal the Snitch
3003.description: A nervous man constantly looking over his shoulder.
dialogue: Got a coin? I'll tell you a secret.
The warehouse guards are easily bribed.

3004.name: Lucky Pete
dialogue: Hey pal, I lost my lucky coin. Find it for me, will ya?

3005.name: Mama Rosa
dialogue: Eat up, dear. You look starved.
These streets are no place for a decent person.

3006.name: Street Thug
3006.description: A rough-looking thug with a crowbar.

3007.name: Corrupt Cop
3007.description: A police officer with a sinister smirk.

3008.name: Mob Enforcer
3008.description: A hulking brute in a tailored suit.

3009.name: Dock Worker
3009.description: A burly worker wielding a cargo hook.

3012.name: Hired Gun
3012.description: A professional killer with cold eyes.

3013.name: Femme Fatale Assassin
3013.description: A deadly woman with a concealed weapon.

3014.name: Bootlegger
3014.description: A smuggler carrying crates of illegal booze.

3015.name: Loan Shark
3015.description: A sleazy man counting a wad of cash.

3016.name: Arsonist
3016.description: A maniac playing with a lighter.

3017.name: Shadow Stalker
3017.description: A figure blending into the darkness.

3018.name: Poisoner
3018.description: A sinister individual with vials of toxic liquids.

3019.name: Brass Knuckle Brawler
3019.description: A tough guy with brass knuckles.

3020.name: Tommy Gun Gangster
3020.description: A mobster wielding a tommy gun.

3023.name: Wharf Rat
3023.description: A desperate scavenger of the docks.

4001.name: Sergeant Rock
4001.description: A grizzled veteran offering combat tips.
dialogue: Keep your head down, rookie!
Watch out for the razor wire.

4002.name: Arms Dealer Vick
dialogue: Got the best guns in the jungle.
Cash only.

4003.name: Nurse Chapel
4003.description: A field medic ready to heal.
dialogue: Let me patch you up.
Stay safe out there.

4004.name: Radio Operator Sparks
dialogue: I'm picking up strange signals.
Can you find the abort code?

4005.name: Prisoner Zero
dialogue: Thank you for rescuing me!
They took my squad to the silo.

4012.name: Flamethrower Troop
4012.description: Wielding a deadly stream of fire.

4014.name: Helicopter Gunship
4014.description: The ultimate boss of the base.

5001.name: Shadow Ninja
5001.description: A stealthy assassin clad in dark garb.

5002.name: Oni Demon
5002.description: A hulking red demon with a spiked club.

5003.name: Kitsune Trickster
5003.description: A multi-tailed fox spirit with a mischievous grin.

5004.name: Bamboo Golem
5004.description: A construct made entirely of animated bamboo stalks.

5005.name: Spirit Fox
5005.description: An ethereal fox glowing with blue light.

5006.name: Corrupted Monk
5006.description: A former holy man now consumed by dark energy.

5007.name: Thunder Elemental
5007.description: A crackling being of pure electricity.

5008.name: Ice Wraith
5008.description: A chilling spirit that freezes the air around it.

5009.name: Dragon Hatchling
5009.description: A small but fierce dragon with shimmering scales.

5010.name: Tengu Warrior
5010.description: A bird-like humanoid wielding a sharp katana.

5011.name: Yokai Shapeshifter
5011.description: A strange creature whose form constantly shifts.

5012.name: Cursed Samurai
5012.description: An undead warrior bound to his ancient armor.

5013.name: Paper Charm Construct
5013.description: A magical being made of folded paper talismans.

5014.name: Wind Spirit
5014.description: A swirling vortex of razor-sharp winds.

5015.name: Jade Serpent
5015.description: A massive snake with scales like polished jade.

5016.name: Demon General
5016.description: A towering boss demon commanding the dark forces.
dialogue: You dare challenge me?!

5017.name: Training Dummy
5017.description: A wooden dummy used for martial arts practice.

5018.name: Wild Boar
5018.description: An aggressive boar with sharp tusks.

5019.name: Master Shen
5019.description: An old, wise trainer sitting peacefully.
dialogue: Patience is the key to true strength.
Seek the Flame of the Masters in the West Pavilion.

5020.name: Sakura
5020.description: A gentle healer tending to the tea house.
dialogue: Would you like some tea? It heals the spirit.

5021.name: Wandering Ronin
5021.description: A masterless samurai looking for purpose.
dialogue: I have a task for you, if you are brave enough.
Bring me the Ancient Scroll of Power!

5022.name: Spirit Guide Yuki
dialogue: A sphere of perfect clarity bounced between the floating shards, leaving ripples in the clouds.

5023.name: Merchant Tanuki
5023.description: A raccoon-dog merchant with a sly smile.
dialogue: I have many wares, for the right price!

6001.name: Gladiator Champion Rex
6001.desc: A scarred veteran of the arena.
dialogue: Train hard, fight harder.
I have a special reward if you prove yourself.

6002.name: Scribe Ptolemy
6002.desc: An old man surrounded by scrolls.
dialogue: The Lion's Eye opens the way in the catacombs.
Knowledge is power.

6003.name: Merchant Marcus
dialogue: Buy my wares!
Some perfect sphere rolled through here and ruined my amphorae!

6004.name: Oracle Pythia
6004.desc: A mystic woman breathing strange vapors.
dialogue: The oracles speak of a perfect sphere that rolled through the forum...
The future is clouded.

6005.name: Slave Spartacus
dialogue: If only I had my freedom papers...
I will not be a slave forever.

6006.name: Gladiator
6006.desc: A fierce fighter in the arena.

6008.name: Tomb Guardian
6008.desc: An animated statue protecting the tomb.

6009.name: Mummy Priest
6009.desc: An undead priest wrapped in bandages.

6011.name: Greek Hoplite
6011.desc: A soldier in a bronze breastplate.

6014.name: Sand Scorpion
6014.desc: A huge scorpion hiding in the sand.

6016.name: Chariot Rider
6016.desc: A fast-moving attacker on a chariot.

6019.name: Aqueduct Serpent
6019.desc: A giant snake living in the water.

6021.name: Arena Beast
6021.desc: A wild lion kept for the games.

6022.name: Undead Pharaoh
6022.desc: An ancient ruler raised from the dead.

6023.name: Stone Golem
6023.desc: A magical construct of solid rock.
